steps.title: Identify the key similarity
steps.content: To emphasize a similarity, identify what both specimens share. In the notes: Sue and Thomas both belong to genus Tyrannosaurus.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice A states that Sue and Thomas are both members of genus Tyrannosaurus. The other choices either establish differences, describe single specimens, or omit comparison. That matches choice A — A is correct.
